subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant, thy detailed letter was perused with the utmost delight and fragrance. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان روزنامه مفصل شما بنهایت روح و ریحان قرائت گردید الحمد لله خود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
